mapper.select: SELECT twst.*, td.driver_name, td.telephone driverTelephone FROM t_waybill_split_transport twst left join t_driver td on twst.driver_id = td.driver_id WHERE twst.waybill_id = #{waybillId}

SELECT twst.*, td.driver_name, td.telephone driverTelephone FROM t_waybill_split_transport twst left join t_driver td on twst.driver_id = td.driver_id WHERE twst.split_transport_id = #{splitTransportId}

SELECT twst.driver_id FROM t_waybill_split_transport twst WHERE twst.waybill_id in
#{item}
